stemHtml: On overwater flights, for aeroplanes capable of continuing the flight to an aerodrome with the critical power unit(s) becoming inoperative at any point along the route or planned diversions, sufficient life-rafts to carry all persons on board are to be carried, to operate an aeroplane at a distance away from land, which is suitable for making an emergency landing, greater than that corresponding to … : (i) … minutes at cruising speed or ... (ii) … nautical miles, whichever is the lesser The required values are:
